item.title: Biogen Investor Lawsuit Settlement
item.description:
• Summary: Biogen has settled an investor lawsuit related to its messaging around an Alzheimer's drug, likely aducanumab (Aduhelm) or lecanemab (Leqembi). The lawsuit alleged misleading communications about clinical trial results, and the settlement aims to resolve claims without admitting wrongdoing, amid ongoing scrutiny of Alzheimer's therapies.
  • MoAs: Aducanumab and lecanemab are monoclonal antibodies targeting amyloid-beta plaques in the brain to slow Alzheimer's disease progression.
  • Sources: Fierce Pharma
